subject: Update SDNC/CDS for El Alto
commit_message:
Update SDNC/CDS for El Alto

Update image versions of SDNC and CDS for El Alto staging

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> dan what is the use of image overrides ? seems useful to integration but the tags are already in the values ?

That particular version isn't necessarily helpful except as an example - although I actually used that with the oom master branch to test my staging versions.  I thought it'd be helpful to include it as an example in case you needed to override with specific builds.

Patch Set 2:

Agree it is useful - keep it
